prompt: Tap left hole card to keep your read and action aligned.
why_v1: Card anchors keep your decision process consistent.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Tc is the anchor card, so the read stays tied to the exact hole-card cue this line is built on.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. The ten of clubs matters because that card decides whether your hand has enough blocker or showdown value to stay inside the guardrails.
